API docs by Redocly

Kaza & Tazminat Yonetim Platformu API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

API Ekibi: api@kazaplatform.example.com License: Proprietary

Trafik kazasi tazminat platformu icin tek kapsamli API sozlesmesi. Mobil ve web (son kullanici) ile admin panel (personel) tek API uzerinden hizmet alir. Son kullanici rotalari /app, yonetim rotalari /admin altinda ayrilmistir.

Auth

Kimlik dogrulama ve oturum

Son kullanici girisi yapar

Request Body schema: application/json
required
identifier
required
string <= 255 characters

Telefon numarasi veya e-posta adresi

password
required
string <password>

Hesap sifresi

device_id
string <= 128 characters

Push bildirimi ve oturum takibi icin cihaz tanimlayici (opsiyonel)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/login

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/login

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "identifier": "string",
  • "password": "pa$$word",
  • "device_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0In0.abc123",
    • "refresh_token": "rt_8f3a9c2b1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 3600
    },
  • "user": {
    • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
    • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
    • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
    • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
    • "phone": "+905321234567",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "status": "aktif",
    • "case_count": 3,
    • "total_compensation": 4500000,
    • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
    • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
    • "national_id": "10000000146"
    }
}

Oturumu kapatir ve refresh tokeni gecersiz kilar

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
refresh_token
required
string <= 255 characters

Gecersiz kilinacak refresh token

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/logout

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/logout

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "refresh_token": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "bad_request",
    • "message": "Istek gecersiz veya hatali bicimlendirilmis.",
    • "request_id": "req_01HZX8K9P2",
    • "details": [ ]
    }
}

Telefon numarasini OTP kodu ile dogrular

Request Body schema: application/json
required
phone
required
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

code
required
string^[0-9]{6}$

SMS ile gonderilen 6 haneli dogrulama kodu

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/otp/verify

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/otp/verify

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "code": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0In0.abc123",
    • "refresh_token": "rt_8f3a9c2b1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 3600
    },
  • "user": {
    • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
    • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
    • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
    • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
    • "phone": "+905321234567",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "status": "aktif",
    • "case_count": 3,
    • "total_compensation": 4500000,
    • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
    • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
    • "national_id": "10000000146"
    }
}

Sifre sifirlama talebi olusturur ve dogrulama kodu gonderir

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
identifier
required
string <= 255 characters

Hesaba bagli telefon numarasi veya e-posta adresi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/password/forgot

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/password/forgot

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "identifier": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "bad_request",
    • "message": "Istek gecersiz veya hatali bicimlendirilmis.",
    • "request_id": "req_01HZX8K9P2",
    • "details": [ ]
    }
}

Dogrulama kodu ile yeni sifre belirler

Request Body schema: application/json
required
reset_token
required
string <= 255 characters

Sifre sifirlama akisinda verilen dogrulama tokeni

new_password
required
string <password> [ 8 .. 128 ] characters

Belirlenecek yeni sifre

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/password/reset

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/password/reset

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reset_token": "string",
  • "new_password": "pa$$word"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0In0.abc123",
    • "refresh_token": "rt_8f3a9c2b1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 3600
    },
  • "user": {
    • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
    • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
    • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
    • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
    • "phone": "+905321234567",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "status": "aktif",
    • "case_count": 3,
    • "total_compensation": 4500000,
    • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
    • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
    • "national_id": "10000000146"
    }
}

Refresh token ile yeni oturum tokenlari uretir

Request Body schema: application/json
required
refresh_token
required
string <= 255 characters

Daha once verilmis gecerli refresh token

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/refresh

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/refresh

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "refresh_token": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0In0.abc123",
    • "refresh_token": "rt_8f3a9c2b1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 3600
    },
  • "user": {
    • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
    • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
    • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
    • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
    • "phone": "+905321234567",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "status": "aktif",
    • "case_count": 3,
    • "total_compensation": 4500000,
    • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
    • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
    • "national_id": "10000000146"
    }
}

Son kullanici kaydi olusturur

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
full_name
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Kullanicinin ad soyad bilgisi

email
string <email>

E-posta adresi (opsiyonel)

phone
required
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

national_id
string (NationalId) ^[1-9][0-9]{10}$

T.C. Kimlik Numarasi (11 hane).

password
required
string <password> [ 8 .. 128 ] characters

Hesap sifresi

referral_code
string <= 32 characters

Davet eden kullanicinin referans kodu (opsiyonel)

accept_terms
boolean

Kullanim sozlesmesinin kabul edildigi bilgisi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/register

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/register

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "full_name": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "national_id": "10000000146",
  • "password": "pa$$word",
  • "referral_code": "string",
  • "accept_terms": true
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0In0.abc123",
    • "refresh_token": "rt_8f3a9c2b1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 3600
    },
  • "user": {
    • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
    • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
    • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
    • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
    • "phone": "+905321234567",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "status": "aktif",
    • "case_count": 3,
    • "total_compensation": 4500000,
    • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
    • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
    • "national_id": "10000000146"
    }
}

Personel (admin panel) girisi yapar

Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
required
string <email>

Personel kurumsal e-posta adresi

password
required
string <password>

Personel sifresi

otp_code
string^[0-9]{6}$

Iki adimli dogrulama kodu (etkinse gerekli)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/staff/login

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/auth/staff/login

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "password": "pa$$word",
  • "otp_code": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tokens": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0In0.abc123",
    • "refresh_token": "rt_8f3a9c2b1d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 3600
    },
  • "user": {
    • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
    • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
    • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
    • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
    • "phone": "+905321234567",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "status": "aktif",
    • "case_count": 3,
    • "total_compensation": 4500000,
    • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
    • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
    • "national_id": "10000000146"
    }
}

Profil

Son kullanici profili ve belgeleri

Kendi profil bilgilerimi getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
  • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
  • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "city": "Istanbul",
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "case_count": 3,
  • "total_compensation": 4500000,
  • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
  • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
  • "national_id": "10000000146"
}

Kendi profil bilgilerimi guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
full_name
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Ad soyad

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

email
string <email>

E-posta adresi

national_id
string (NationalId) ^[1-9][0-9]{10}$

T.C. Kimlik Numarasi (11 hane).

object (Address)

Acik adres bilgisi.

avatar_url
string <uri>

Profil fotografi adresi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "full_name": "string",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "national_id": "10000000146",
  • "address": {
    • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
    • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
    • "district": "Kadikoy",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "postal_code": "34710",
    • "country": "TR",
    • "geo": {
      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      }
    },
  • "avatar_url": "http://example.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  • "code": "MS-2026-0042",
  • "full_name": "Ahmet Yilmaz",
  • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "city": "Istanbul",
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "case_count": 3,
  • "total_compensation": 4500000,
  • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
  • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",
  • "national_id": "10000000146"
}

Kendi belgelerimi listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

document_type
string (DocumentType)
Enum: "foto" "evrak" "police" "kimlik" "ruhsat" "rapor" "diger"
Examples: document_type=foto

Belge turune gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me/documents

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me/documents

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "5a6b7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      • "type": "foto",
      • "file_name": "kaza_foto_1.jpg",
      • "url": "https://cdn.example.com/docs/5a6b7c8d.jpg",
      • "size_bytes": 248512,
      • "uploaded_at": "2026-06-22T17:45:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni belge yukle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
document_type
required
string (DocumentType)
Enum: "foto" "evrak" "police" "kimlik" "ruhsat" "rapor" "diger"

Belge tipi. foto|evrak|police|kimlik|ruhsat|rapor|diger

file_name
required
string [ 1 .. 255 ] characters

Dosya adi

file_url
required
string <uri>

Yuklenmis dosyanin erisim adresi

content_type
string <= 120 characters

MIME turu (ornek: application/pdf)

size_bytes
integer >= 0

Dosya boyutu (byte)

description
string <= 500 characters

Belge aciklamasi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me/documents

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me/documents

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "document_type": "foto",
  • "file_name": "string",
  • "file_url": "http://example.com",
  • "content_type": "string",
  • "size_bytes": 0,
  • "description": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "5a6b7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f7a8b9c0d",
  • "type": "foto",
  • "file_name": "kaza_foto_1.jpg",
  • "url": "https://cdn.example.com/docs/5a6b7c8d.jpg",
  • "size_bytes": 248512,
  • "uploaded_at": "2026-06-22T17:45:00Z"
}

Belgemi sil

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
documentId
required
string <uuid>

Belge kimligi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me/documents/{documentId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/me/documents/{documentId}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "unauthorized",
    • "message": "Yetkilendirme gerekli.",
    • "request_id": "req_01HZX8K9P3",
    • "details": [ ]
    }
}

Bildirimlerimi listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

is_read
boolean

Okunma durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/notifications

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/notifications

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "title": "string",
      • "body": "string",
      • "category": "string",
      • "read_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Bildirimi okundu olarak isaretle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
notificationId
required
string <uuid>

Bildirim kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/notifications/{notificationId}/read

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/notifications/{notificationId}/read

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "title": "string",
  • "body": "string",
  • "category": "string",
  • "read_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Araclar

Son kullanici araclari

Araclarimi listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

vehicle_type
string (VehicleType)
Enum: "otomobil" "motosiklet" "kamyon" "minibus"
Examples: vehicle_type=otomobil

Arac turune gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicles

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicles

  • 401
  • 429

Content type
application/json
{

    • {
      • "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7a8b-9c0d-1e2f3a4b5c6d",
      • "plate": "34ABC123",
      • "make": "Toyota",
      • "model": "Corolla",
      • "year": 2021,
      • "color": "Beyaz",
      • "type": "otomobil",
      • "owner_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
      • "company_id": "b2e6a1c3-1a5e-44ae-a8fd-81f76fd715cf",
      • "km": 45000,
      • "tramer_count": 2,
      • "created_at": "2026-02-10T11:00:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "fuel_type": "benzin",
      • "rayic_value": 150000,
      • "vin": "WVWZZZ1KZAW000001",
      • "engine_no": "string",
      • "insurance_company": "string",
      • "policy_no": "string",
      • "insurance_expiry": "2019-08-24",
      • "inspection_expiry": "2019-08-24",
      • "is_primary": true,
      • "is_total_loss": true
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni arac ekle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
plate
required
string (PlateNumber) <= 10 characters ^[0-9]{2}[A-Z]{1,3}[0-9]{2,4}$

Turkiye arac plakasi (bosluksuz, buyuk harf).

make
required
string [ 1 .. 60 ] characters

Marka

model
required
string [ 1 .. 60 ] characters

Model

color
string <= 40 characters

Renk

vin
string (Vin) <= 17 characters ^[A-HJ-NPR-Z0-9]{17}$

Sasi no (VIN, 17 hane).

type
required
string (VehicleType)
Enum: "otomobil" "motosiklet" "kamyon" "minibus"

Arac tipi. otomobil|motosiklet|kamyon|minibus

year
integer [ 1950 .. 2100 ]

Model yili

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicles

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicles

Arac bilgilerini guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
vehicleId
required
string <uuid>

Arac kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
plate
string (PlateNumber) <= 10 characters ^[0-9]{2}[A-Z]{1,3}[0-9]{2,4}$

Turkiye arac plakasi (bosluksuz, buyuk harf).

make
string [ 1 .. 60 ] characters

Marka

model
string [ 1 .. 60 ] characters

Model

color
string <= 40 characters

Renk

vin
string (Vin) <= 17 characters ^[A-HJ-NPR-Z0-9]{17}$

Sasi no (VIN, 17 hane).

type
string (VehicleType)
Enum: "otomobil" "motosiklet" "kamyon" "minibus"

Arac tipi. otomobil|motosiklet|kamyon|minibus

year
integer [ 1950 .. 2100 ]

Model yili

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicles/{vehicleId}

Dosyalar

Tazminat dosyalari (kaza-ani wizard ile acilir)

Kullanicinin dosyalarini listeler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

status
string (CaseStatus)
Enum: "yeni" "inceleme" "belge" "basvuru" "odeme" "tamam" "red"
Examples: status=inceleme

Dosya durumuna gore filtreler.

type
string (CalculationType)
Enum: "maddi" "maluliyet" "olumlu" "yarali" "kusur"
Examples: type=maddi

Hesaplama/dosya turune gore filtreler.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "d4c3b2a1-f6e5-8b7a-0d9c-2f1e4b3a6c5d",
      • "code": "KR-2026-1042",
      • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
      • "type": "maddi",
      • "vehicle_id": "e57c411b-caf2-4a2e-b2e8-e232824b6ddf",
      • "status": "inceleme",
      • "estimated_amount": 7500000,
      • "approved_amount": 6800000,
      • "fault_rate": 25,
      • "assignee_id": "e209ca2d-190b-4818-b659-67d4ef4f1ce8",
      • "plate": "34ABC123",
      • "accident_date": "2026-01-15T08:30:00Z",
      • "opened_at": "2026-06-01T13:45:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2026-06-22T16:20:00Z",
      • "created_by": "ee824cad-d7a6-4f48-87dc-e8461a9201c4",
      • "updated_by": "deea00dc-b6b6-4412-a483-26ac61e1f6fe",
      • "counterparty": {
        • "insurer_name": "string",
        • "insurer_phone": "+905321234567",
        • "plate": "34ABC123",
        • "policy_no": "string",
        • "location": {
          • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
          • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
          • "district": "Kadikoy",
          • "city": "Istanbul",
          • "postal_code": "34710",
          • "country": "TR",
          • "geo": {
            • "lat": 41.0082,
            • "lng": 28.9784
            }
          }
        }
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Kaza-ani wizard ile yeni dosya acar

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object

Kaza-ani ilk degerlendirme bilgileri.

accident_date
required
string <date-time>

Kazanin meydana geldigi tarih ve saat.

required
object (LocationWithAddress)

Koordinat + acik adres.

type
required
string (CalculationType)
Enum: "maddi" "maluliyet" "olumlu" "yarali" "kusur"

Hesaplama/dosya tipi. maddi|maluliyet|olumlu|yarali|kusur

vehicle_id
required
string <uuid>

Kazaya karisan kullanici aracinin kimligi.

Array of objects

Kazaya karisan taraflar.

photos
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]

Kaza-ani yuklenen fotograf belge kimlikleri.

string or null

Kullanicinin ek notlari.

string or null

Bagli hesaplama kaydinin kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "triage": {
    • "needs_112": true,
    • "injured_count": 0
    },
  • "accident_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "location": {
    • "geo": {
      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      },
    • "address": {
      • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
      • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
      • "district": "Kadikoy",
      • "city": "Istanbul",
      • "postal_code": "34710",
      • "country": "TR",
      • "geo": {
        • "lat": 41.0082,
        • "lng": 28.9784
        }
      }
    },
  • "type": "maddi",
  • "vehicle_id": "e57c411b-caf2-4a2e-b2e8-e232824b6ddf",
  • "parties": [
    • {
      • "full_name": "string",
      • "plate": "34ABC123",
      • "role": "taraf",
      • "insurer_name": "string",
      • "insurer_phone": "+905321234567",
      • "policy_no": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "photos": [
    • "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    ],
  • "notes": "string",
  • "linked_calculation_id": "55930c76-74ca-4c05-b14a-658dd368f458"
}

Dosyaya bagli belgeleri listeler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosyanin benzersiz kimligi.

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

document_type
string (DocumentType)
Enum: "foto" "evrak" "police" "kimlik" "ruhsat" "rapor" "diger"
Examples: document_type=foto

Belge turune gore filtreler.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/documents

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/documents

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "5a6b7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      • "type": "foto",
      • "file_name": "kaza_foto_1.jpg",
      • "url": "https://cdn.example.com/docs/5a6b7c8d.jpg",
      • "size_bytes": 248512,
      • "uploaded_at": "2026-06-22T17:45:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Dosyaya yeni belge ekler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosyanin benzersiz kimligi.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
document_type
required
string (DocumentType)
Enum: "foto" "evrak" "police" "kimlik" "ruhsat" "rapor" "diger"

Belge tipi. foto|evrak|police|kimlik|ruhsat|rapor|diger

file_name
required
string [ 1 .. 255 ] characters

Dosya adi

file_url
required
string <uri>

Yuklenmis dosyanin erisim adresi

content_type
string <= 120 characters

MIME turu (ornek: application/pdf)

size_bytes
integer >= 0

Dosya boyutu (byte)

description
string <= 500 characters

Belge aciklamasi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/documents

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/documents

Request samples

  • Payload

application/json

  • "file_name": "string",
  • "file_url": "http://example.com",
  • "content_type": "string",
  • "size_bytes": 0,
  • "description": "string"
}

Dosya sohbet mesajlarini listeler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosyanin benzersiz kimligi.

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/messages

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/messages

      • "attachments": [
        • {
          • "id": "5a6b7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f7a8b9c0d",

Dosya sohbetine mesaj gonderir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosyanin benzersiz kimligi.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
body
required
string [ 1 .. 4000 ] characters

Mesaj metni.

attachment_ids
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]

Mesaja eklenen belge kimlikleri.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/messages

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/cases/{caseId}/messages

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosyanin benzersiz kimligi.

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

Responses

Production

Hesaplamalar

Tazminat hesaplama motoru

Hesaplama gecmisini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

type
string (CalculationType)
Enum: "maddi" "maluliyet" "olumlu" "yarali" "kusur"
Examples: type=maddi

Hesaplama tipine gore filtrele (maddi/maluliyet/olumlu/yarali/kusur)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1e2f-3a4b-5c6d7e8f9a0b",
      • "code": "H-58210",
      • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
      • "type": "maddi",
      • "input": {
        • "gelir": 3500000,
        • "yas": 34,
        • "maluliyet_orani": 18
        },
      • "estimated_amount": 9200000,
      • "fault_rate": 0,
      • "accident_date": "2026-05-30T08:30:00Z",
      • "linked_case_id": "3cd7333e-70f3-486b-974b-514522342fc3",
      • "breakdown": [
        • {
          • "label": "Maluliyet tazminati",
          • "amount": 8000000
          },
        • {
          • "label": "Tedavi giderleri",
          • "amount": 1200000
          }
        ],
      • "created_at": "2026-06-18T10:05:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni tazminat hesaplamasi yap

Misafir kullanici da hesaplama yapabilir. Govde tipine gore degisir (discriminator type).

Authorizations:
NonebearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string

Hesaplama tipi

accident_date
required
string <date-time>

Kaza tarihi

required
object

Arac bilgileri

damage_amount
required
integer <int64> (MoneyKurus) >= 0

Para tutari kurus (minor units) cinsinden. Ornek 150000 = 1.500,00 TL.

tramer_count
integer >= 0

Tramer (hasar gecmisi) kayit sayisi

service_days
integer >= 0

Serviste gecen gun sayisi (ikame arac)

is_total_loss
boolean

Pert (tam ziya) durumu

fault_rate
required
integer [ 0 .. 100 ]

Kusur orani (yuzde)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "type": "maddi",
  • "accident_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "vehicle": {
    • "make": "string",
    • "model": "string",
    • "year": 0,
    • "value": 150000
    },
  • "damage_amount": 150000,
  • "tramer_count": 0,
  • "service_days": 0,
  • "is_total_loss": true,
  • "fault_rate": 100
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1e2f-3a4b-5c6d7e8f9a0b",
  • "code": "H-58210",
  • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
  • "type": "maddi",
  • "input": {
    • "gelir": 3500000,
    • "yas": 34,
    • "maluliyet_orani": 18
    },
  • "estimated_amount": 9200000,
  • "fault_rate": 0,
  • "accident_date": "2026-05-30T08:30:00Z",
  • "linked_case_id": "3cd7333e-70f3-486b-974b-514522342fc3",
  • "breakdown": [
    • {
      • "label": "Maluliyet tazminati",
      • "amount": 8000000
      },
    • {
      • "label": "Tedavi giderleri",
      • "amount": 1200000
      }
    ],
  • "created_at": "2026-06-18T10:05:00Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Hesaplamayi dosyaya cevir

Mevcut bir hesaplamadan yeni bir tazminat dosyasi (Case) olusturur.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

Dosyaya cevrilecek hesaplama kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/convert-to-case

bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

page
integer >= 1
Default: 1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

Hesaplamaya ait hasarli parca listesini tumuyle degistir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

Hesaplama kaydinin benzersiz kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of objects (DamagePartInput)

Yeni hasarli parca listesi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/damage-parts

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/damage-parts

      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "body_region": "string",
      • "rate": 100,
      • "description": "string",
      • "calculation_id": "e12d16eb-d9f1-4b0f-947a-21bb0f2f3dc6",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Hesaplamaya ait saglik raporunu getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

Hesaplama kaydinin benzersiz kimligi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/medical-report

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/medical-report

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "disability_rate": 100,
  • "regions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "treatment_process": "string",
  • "report_document_id": "3472a356-1728-42f3-91f1-037cbbe45730",
  • "board_date": "2019-08-24"
}

Hesaplamaya ait saglik raporunu guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

Hesaplama kaydinin benzersiz kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
disability_rate
integer [ 0 .. 100 ]

Kalici malullük orani (yuzde)

regions
Array of strings

Raporda yer alan vucut bolgeleri

treatment_process
string <= 2000 characters

Tedavi sureci aciklamasi

string or null

Rapor belgesinin benzersiz kimligi

string or null

Saglik kurulu rapor tarihi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/medical-report

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/calculations/{calculationId}/medical-report

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "disability_rate": 100,
  • "regions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "treatment_process": "string",
  • "report_document_id": "3472a356-1728-42f3-91f1-037cbbe45730",
  • "board_date": "2019-08-24"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "disability_rate": 100,
  • "regions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "treatment_process": "string",
  • "report_document_id": "3472a356-1728-42f3-91f1-037cbbe45730",
  • "board_date": "2019-08-24"
}

bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

    }

Arac tipine gore kroki parca katalogunu listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
vehicle_type
string

Parca katalogunun filtreleneceği arac tipi

page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicle-parts

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/vehicle-parts

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500

application/json

  • "data": [
    • {
      • "code": "string",
      • "label": "string",
      • "part_group": "string",
      • "region": "string"
      }
    ],

    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,

    • "total_pages": 7,

    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Hizmetler

Cekici, sigorta teklifi, acil yardim

Yakindaki hastaneleri listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

lat
required
number <double>

Enlem koordinati

lng
required
number <double>

Boylam koordinati

radius_km
number <double>

Arama yaricapi (kilometre)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/hospitals/nearby

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/hospitals/nearby

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "address": {
        • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",

          • "lng": 28.9784

        },
      • "distance_km": 0.1,
      • "phone": "+905321234567",
      • "geo": {
        • "lat": 41.0082,
        • "lng": 28.9784
        }
      }
    ],

    • "page": 1,

    • "has_prev": true
    }

Sigorta tekliflerimi listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

type
string (InsuranceType)
Enum: "kasko" "trafik" "mini_kasko" "dask" "saglik" "konut"
Examples: type=kasko

Sigorta turune gore filtrele

status
string (InsuranceStatus)
Enum: "teklif" "police" "odendi" "iptal"
Examples: status=teklif

Teklif durumuna gore filtrele

vehicle_id
string <uuid>

Belirli bir araca ait teklifleri filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/insurance/offers

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/insurance/offers

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "3e4f5a6b-7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
      • "code": "SG-7741",
      • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
      • "vehicle_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7a8b-9c0d-1e2f3a4b5c6d",
      • "type": "kasko",
      • "company_name": "Anadolu Sigorta",
      • "premium": 1250000,
      • "status": "teklif",
      • "offer_count": 4,
      • "valid_until": "2026-07-15",
      • "created_at": "2026-06-20T11:00:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Sigorta teklifi iste

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
vehicle_id
required
string <uuid>

Teklif istenen aracin kimligi

type
required
string (InsuranceType)
Enum: "kasko" "trafik" "mini_kasko" "dask" "saglik" "konut"

Sigorta tipi. kasko|trafik

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/insurance/offers

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/insurance/offers

}

Anlik konum paylas

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
string or null

Iliskili dosya kimligi

share_with
required
Array of strings (PhoneNumber) [ items^\+90[0-9]{10}$ ]

Konumun paylasilacagi telefon numaralari

required
object (GeoPoint)

Cografi konum (enlem/boylam).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/location/broadcasts

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/location/broadcasts

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "case_id": "c74269e5-1f97-4e20-9164-ffbe3494d8d6",
  • "share_with": [
    • "+905321234567"
    ],
  • "geo": {
    • "lat": 41.0082,
    • "lng": 28.9784
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "share_url": "http://example.com"
}

Acil yardim (SOS) talebi gonder

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (GeoPoint)

Cografi konum (enlem/boylam).

string or null

Iliskili dosya kimligi (varsa)

string or null

Acil duruma iliskin ek aciklama

Responses

  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Cekici taleplerimi listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

status
string (TowStatus)
Enum: "ariyor" "yolda" "tamam" "iptal"
Examples: status=yolda

Cekici talebi durumuna gore filtrele

vehicle_id
string <uuid>

Belirli bir araca ait cekici taleplerini filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/tow-requests

        • "geo": {

Yeni cekici talebi olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
vehicle_id
required
string <uuid>

Cekilecek aracin kimligi

reason
required
string (TowReason)
Enum: "kaza" "ariza" "lastik" "yakit"

Cekici cagirma nedeni. kaza|ariza|lastik|yakit

string or null

Iliskili sigorta police kimligi (varsa)

string or null

Cekici talebine iliskin ek not

required
object (LocationWithAddress)

Koordinat + acik adres.

LocationWithAddress (object) or null

Birakilacak konum.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/tow-requests

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/tow-requests

application/json

      • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
      • "district": "Kadikoy",
      • "city": "Istanbul",
      • "postal_code": "34710",
      • "country": "TR",
      • "geo": {
        • "lat": 41.0082,
        • "lng": 28.9784
        }
      }
    },
  • "to_location": {
    • "geo": {
      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      },
    • "address": {
      • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
      • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
      • "district": "Kadikoy",
      • "city": "Istanbul",
      • "postal_code": "34710",
      • "country": "TR",
      • "geo": {
        • "lat": 41.0082,
        • "lng": 28.9784
        }
      }
    }
}

Cekici talebi detayini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
towId
required
string <uuid>

Cekici talebini iptal et

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
towId
required
string <uuid>

Cekici talebi kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
reason
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Iptal gerekcesi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/tow-requests/{towId}/cancel

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/tow-requests/{towId}/cancel

application/json

}

Cuzdan

Cuzdan, referans ve para cekme

Kullanicinin referans davetlerini sayfali listeler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/referrals

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/referrals

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "1c2d3e4f-5a6b-7c8d-9e0f-1a2b3c4d5e6f",
      • "invitee_name": "Ayse Kara",
      • "status": "davet",
      • "reward_amount": 50000,
      • "created_at": "2026-06-10T08:15:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Kullanicinin referans kodunu ve paylasim baglantisini getirir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/referrals/code

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/referrals/code

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "code": "REF-AB12CD",
  • "share_url": "https://app.example.com/r/REF-AB12CD"
}

Cuzdan bakiyesini ve ozet bilgilerini getirir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "balance": 350000,
  • "withdrawable": 300000,
  • "total_earnings": 850000,
  • "currency": "TRY",
  • "invited_count": 7,
  • "active_case_count": 2
}

Cuzdan hareketlerini sayfali listeler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet/transactions

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "0b1c2d3e-4f5a-6b7c-8d9e-0f1a2b3c4d5e",
      • "type": "referans",
      • "amount": 0,
      • "description": "Referans odulu - Ayse K.",
      • "balance_after": 350000,
      • "created_at": "2026-06-15T17:30:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Para cekme taleplerini sayfali listeler

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

status
string (WithdrawalStatus)
Enum: "beklemede" "odendi" "red"

Talep durumuna gore filtreleme (beklemede, odendi, red)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet/withdrawals

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet/withdrawals

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "amount": 150000,
      • "status": "beklemede",
      • "iban": "TR330006100519786457841326",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni para cekme talebi olusturur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
amount
required
integer <int64> >= 0

Cekilmek istenen tutar (kurus)

iban
required
string (Iban) ^TR[0-9]{24}$

TR IBAN.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet/withdrawals

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/wallet/withdrawals

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "amount": 150000,
  • "iban": "TR330006100519786457841326"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "amount": 150000,
  • "status": "beklemede",
  • "iban": "TR330006100519786457841326",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Admin-CRM

Musteri, kurumsal ve arac yonetimi

Kurumsal sirket listesini getir (sayfalanmis)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

status
string (CompanyStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "pasif" "onay"
Examples: status=aktif

Sirket durumuna gore filtrele.

city
string

Sirketin sehrine gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "c9d8e7f6-a5b4-3c2d-1e0f-9a8b7c6d5e4f",
      • "name": "Lojistik A.S.",
      • "sector": "Lojistik",
      • "city": "Ankara",
      • "contact_name": "Mehmet Kaya",
      • "phone": "+905321234567",
      • "fleet_size": 24,
      • "case_count": 9,
      • "total_compensation": 18000000,
      • "status": "aktif",
      • "created_at": "2025-11-20T09:30:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "tax_number": "1234567890"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni kurumsal sirket olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
legal_name
required
string [ 2 .. 200 ] characters

Sirketin yasal unvani.

trade_name
string <= 200 characters

Sirketin ticari (marka) adi.

tax_number
required
string (TaxNumber) ^[0-9]{10,11}$

Vergi kimlik no (VKN).

tax_office
string <= 120 characters

Bagli bulunulan vergi dairesi.

email
string <email>

Sirket iletisim e-postasi.

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

status
string (CompanyStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "pasif" "onay"

Kurumsal musteri durumu. aktif|pasif|onay

object (Address)

Acik adres bilgisi.

notes
string <= 2000 characters

Sirket ile ilgili personel notu.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "legal_name": "string",
  • "trade_name": "string",
  • "tax_number": "1234567890",
  • "tax_office": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "address": {
    • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
    • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
    • "district": "Kadikoy",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "postal_code": "34710",
    • "country": "TR",
    • "geo": {
      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      }
    },
  • "notes": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "c9d8e7f6-a5b4-3c2d-1e0f-9a8b7c6d5e4f",
  • "name": "Lojistik A.S.",
  • "sector": "Lojistik",
  • "city": "Ankara",
  • "contact_name": "Mehmet Kaya",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "fleet_size": 24,
  • "case_count": 9,
  • "total_compensation": 18000000,
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "created_at": "2025-11-20T09:30:00Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "tax_number": "1234567890"
}

Sirket detayini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
companyId
required
string <uuid>

Sirket kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "c9d8e7f6-a5b4-3c2d-1e0f-9a8b7c6d5e4f",
  • "name": "Lojistik A.S.",
  • "sector": "Lojistik",
  • "city": "Ankara",
  • "contact_name": "Mehmet Kaya",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "fleet_size": 24,
  • "case_count": 9,
  • "total_compensation": 18000000,
  • "status": "aktif",

Sirket bilgilerini guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
companyId
required
string <uuid>

Sirket kimligi.

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
legal_name
string [ 2 .. 200 ] characters

Sirketin yasal unvani.

trade_name
string <= 200 characters

Sirketin ticari (marka) adi.

tax_number
string (TaxNumber) ^[0-9]{10,11}$

Vergi kimlik no (VKN).

tax_office
string <= 120 characters

Bagli bulunulan vergi dairesi.

email
string <email>

Sirket iletisim e-postasi.

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

status
string (CompanyStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "pasif" "onay"

Kurumsal musteri durumu. aktif|pasif|onay

object (Address)

Acik adres bilgisi.

notes
string <= 2000 characters

Sirket ile ilgili personel notu.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "legal_name": "string",
  • "trade_name": "string",
  • "tax_number": "1234567890",
  • "tax_office": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "address": {
    • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
    • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
    • "district": "Kadikoy",
    • "city": "Istanbul",
    • "postal_code": "34710",
    • "country": "TR",
    • "geo": {
      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      }
    },
  • "notes": "string"
}

Sirketi sil

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
companyId
required
string <uuid>

Sirket kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "unauthorized",
    • "message": "Yetkilendirme gerekli.",
    • "request_id": "req_01HZX8K9P3",
    • "details": [ ]
    }
}

Sirkete ait araclari listele (sayfalanmis)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
companyId
required
string <uuid>

Sirket kimligi.

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

type
string (VehicleType)
Enum: "otomobil" "motosiklet" "kamyon" "minibus"
Examples: type=otomobil

Arac tipine gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}/vehicles

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/companies/{companyId}/vehicles

application/json

    • {

      • "plate": "34ABC123",

      • "km": 45000,

Musteri listesini getir (filtreli, sayfalanmis)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

status
string (CustomerStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "yeni" "pasif"
Examples: status=aktif

Musteri durumuna gore filtrele.

city
string

Musterinin sehrine gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/customers

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/customers

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
      • "code": "MS-2026-0042",

      • "email": "ahmet.yilmaz@example.com",
      • "phone": "+905321234567",
      • "city": "Istanbul",
      • "status": "aktif",
      • "case_count": 3,
      • "total_compensation": 4500000,
      • "referral_code": "AHM-7X9K",
      • "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2026-06-20T14:12:00Z",

      }
    ],

    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni musteri olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
full_name
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Musterinin tam adi.

email
string <email>

Musterinin e-posta adresi.

phone
required
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

national_id
string (NationalId) ^[1-9][0-9]{10}$

T.C. Kimlik Numarasi (11 hane).

birth_date
string <date>

Musterinin dogum tarihi.

status
string (CustomerStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "yeni" "pasif"

Musteri durumu. aktif|yeni|pasif

object (Address)

Acik adres bilgisi.

notes
string <= 2000 characters

Musteri ile ilgili personel notu.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/customers

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/customers

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "national_id": "10000000146",
  • "birth_date": "2019-08-24",
  • "status": "aktif",

    • "country": "TR",

      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      }
    },
  • "notes": "string"
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

customerId
required
string <uuid>

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
full_name
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Musterinin tam adi.

email
string <email>

Musterinin e-posta adresi.

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

national_id
string (NationalId) ^[1-9][0-9]{10}$

T.C. Kimlik Numarasi (11 hane).

birth_date
string <date>

Musterinin dogum tarihi.

status
string (CustomerStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "yeni" "pasif"

Musteri durumu. aktif|yeni|pasif

object (Address)

Acik adres bilgisi.

notes
string <= 2000 characters

Musteri ile ilgili personel notu.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
customerId
required
string <uuid>

Arac listesini getir (filtreli, sayfalanmis)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

type
string (VehicleType)
Enum: "otomobil" "motosiklet" "kamyon" "minibus"
Examples: type=otomobil

Arac tipine gore filtrele.

company_id
string <uuid>

Araci sahip sirkete gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/vehicles

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/vehicles

Arac detayini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
vehicleId
required
string <uuid>

Arac kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/vehicles/{vehicleId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/vehicles/{vehicleId}

  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7a8b-9c0d-1e2f3a4b5c6d",
  • "plate": "34ABC123",
  • "make": "Toyota",
  • "model": "Corolla",
  • "year": 2021,
  • "color": "Beyaz",
  • "type": "otomobil",
  • "owner_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  • "company_id": "b2e6a1c3-1a5e-44ae-a8fd-81f76fd715cf",
  • "km": 45000,
  • "tramer_count": 2,
  • "created_at": "2026-02-10T11:00:00Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "fuel_type": "benzin",
  • "rayic_value": 150000,
  • "vin": "WVWZZZ1KZAW000001",
  • "engine_no": "string",
  • "insurance_company": "string",
  • "policy_no": "string",

Arac bilgilerini guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
vehicleId
required
string <uuid>

Arac kimligi.

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
plate
string (PlateNumber) <= 10 characters ^[0-9]{2}[A-Z]{1,3}[0-9]{2,4}$

Turkiye arac plakasi (bosluksuz, buyuk harf).

type
string (VehicleType)
Enum: "otomobil" "motosiklet" "kamyon" "minibus"

Arac tipi. otomobil|motosiklet|kamyon|minibus

model
string <= 80 characters

Arac modeli.

color
string <= 40 characters

Arac rengi.

company_id
string <uuid>

Araci sahip sirketin kimligi (kurumsal arac ise).

notes
string <= 2000 characters

Arac ile ilgili personel notu.

make
string <= 80 characters

Arac markasi.

year
integer [ 1950 .. 2100 ]

Arac model yili.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/vehicles/{vehicleId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/vehicles/{vehicleId}

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "plate": "34ABC123",
  • "type": "otomobil",
  • "model": "string",
  • "color": "string",
  • "company_id": "b2e6a1c3-1a5e-44ae-a8fd-81f76fd715cf",
  • "notes": "string",
  • "make": "string",
  • "year": 1950
}

Admin-Operasyon

Dosya, hesaplama ve odeme yonetimi

Hesaplama listesini filtreli sekilde getir (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

type
string (CalculationType)
Enum: "maddi" "maluliyet" "olumlu" "yarali" "kusur"
Examples: type=maddi

Hesaplama turune gore filtrele.

customer_id
string <uuid>

Musteri kimligine gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calculations

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calculations

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1e2f-3a4b-5c6d7e8f9a0b",
      • "code": "H-58210",
      • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
      • "type": "maddi",
      • "input": {
        • "gelir": 3500000,
        • "yas": 34,
        • "maluliyet_orani": 18
        },
      • "estimated_amount": 9200000,
      • "fault_rate": 0,
      • "accident_date": "2026-05-30T08:30:00Z",
      • "linked_case_id": "3cd7333e-70f3-486b-974b-514522342fc3",
      • "breakdown": [
        • {
          • "label": "Maluliyet tazminati",
          • "amount": 8000000
          },
        • {
          • "label": "Tedavi giderleri",
          • "amount": 1200000
          }
        ],
      • "created_at": "2026-06-18T10:05:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Tek bir hesaplamanin detayini getir (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
calculationId
required
string <uuid>

Hesaplama kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calculations/{calculationId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calculations/{calculationId}

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500

application/json
{

    • "gelir": 3500000,
    • "yas": 34,
    • "maluliyet_orani": 18
    },

  • "fault_rate": 0,
  • "accident_date": "2026-05-30T08:30:00Z",
  • "linked_case_id": "3cd7333e-70f3-486b-974b-514522342fc3",

    • {
      • "label": "Maluliyet tazminati",
      • "amount": 8000000
      },
    • {

    ],

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Dosya listesini filtreli sekilde getir (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

status
string (CaseStatus)
Enum: "yeni" "inceleme" "belge" "basvuru" "odeme" "tamam" "red"
Examples: status=inceleme

Dosya durumuna gore filtrele.

assignee_id
string <uuid>

Atanmis personel kimligine gore filtrele.

type
string (CalculationType)
Enum: "maddi" "maluliyet" "olumlu" "yarali" "kusur"
Examples: type=maddi

Hesaplama turune gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases

Dosyalari toplu personele ata

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
case_ids
required
Array of strings <uuid> [ 1 .. 500 ] items [ items <uuid > ]
assignee_id
required
string <uuid>

Atanacak personel.

Dosya durumlarini toplu guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
case_ids
required
Array of strings <uuid> [ 1 .. 500 ] items [ items <uuid > ]
status
required
string (CaseStatus)
Enum: "yeni" "inceleme" "belge" "basvuru" "odeme" "tamam" "red"

Dosya durumu. yeni|inceleme|belge|basvuru|odeme|tamam|red

note
string <= 2000 characters

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases/bulk-status

}

Dosya durumu, onaylanan tutar veya kusur oranini guncelle (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosya kimligi.

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
status
string (CaseStatus)
Enum: "yeni" "inceleme" "belge" "basvuru" "odeme" "tamam" "red"

Dosya durumu. yeni|inceleme|belge|basvuru|odeme|tamam|red

MoneyKurus (integer) or null

Onaylanan tutar (null gonderilerek temizlenebilir).

fault_rate
integer [ 0 .. 100 ]

Kusur orani (yuzde).

note
string <= 2000 characters

Guncellemeye iliskin admin notu.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases/{caseId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases/{caseId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "inceleme",
  • "approved_amount": 150000,
  • "fault_rate": 100,
  • "note": "string"
}

Dosyaya admin mesaji gonder (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
caseId
required
string <uuid>

Dosya kimligi.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
body
required
string [ 1 .. 4000 ] characters

Mesaj icerigi.

attachment_ids
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]

Eklenecek belge id listesi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases/{caseId}/messages

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/cases/{caseId}/messages

}

  • "created_at": "2026-06-22T17:50:00Z"
}

Sigorta tekliflerini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

status
string (InsuranceStatus)
Enum: "teklif" "police" "odendi" "iptal"
Examples: status=teklif

Sigorta teklifi durumuna gore filtrele

type
string (InsuranceType)
Enum: "kasko" "trafik" "mini_kasko" "dask" "saglik" "konut"
Examples: type=kasko

Sigorta turune gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/insurance/offers

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/insurance/offers

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "3e4f5a6b-7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
      • "code": "SG-7741",
      • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
      • "vehicle_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7a8b-9c0d-1e2f3a4b5c6d",
      • "type": "kasko",
      • "company_name": "Anadolu Sigorta",
      • "premium": 1250000,
      • "status": "teklif",
      • "offer_count": 4,
      • "valid_until": "2026-07-15",
      • "created_at": "2026-06-20T11:00:00Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Sigorta teklifini guncelle (durum/prim)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
offerId
required
string <uuid>

Sigorta teklifi kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
status
string (InsuranceStatus)
Enum: "teklif" "police" "odendi" "iptal"

Sigorta teklif/police durumu. teklif|police|odendi

premium
integer <int64> >= 0

Sigorta primi (kurus)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/insurance/offers/{offerId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/insurance/offers/{offerId}

Odeme listesini filtreli sekilde getir (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

status
string (PaymentStatus)
Enum: "beklemede" "kismi" "odendi" "islemde" "red"
Examples: status=beklemede

Odeme durumuna gore filtrele.

case_id
string <uuid>

Dosya kimligine gore filtrele.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2f3a-4b5c-6d7e8f9a0b1c",
      • "code": "OD-9921",
      • "case_id": "d4c3b2a1-f6e5-8b7a-0d9c-2f1e4b3a6c5d",
      • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
