    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni odeme olustur (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
case_id
required
string <uuid>

Odemenin baglandigi dosya kimligi.

amount
required
integer <int64> >= 0

Odeme tutari (kurus).

fee
integer <int64> >= 0
Default: 0

Hizmet/komisyon bedeli (kurus).

method
required
string (PaymentMethod)
Enum: "havale" "kredi_karti"

Odeme yontemi. havale|kredi_karti

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "case_id": "c74269e5-1f97-4e20-9164-ffbe3494d8d6",
  • "amount": 150000,
  • "fee": 0,
  • "method": "havale"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2f3a-4b5c-6d7e8f9a0b1c",
  • "code": "OD-9921",
  • "case_id": "d4c3b2a1-f6e5-8b7a-0d9c-2f1e4b3a6c5d",
  • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  • "amount": 6800000,
  • "fee": 1020000,
  • "status": "beklemede",
  • "method": "havale",
  • "paid_at": "2026-06-21T12:00:00Z",
  • "created_at": "2026-06-19T09:00:00Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_by": "ee824cad-d7a6-4f48-87dc-e8461a9201c4",
  • "updated_by": "deea00dc-b6b6-4412-a483-26ac61e1f6fe"
}

Tek bir odemenin detayini getir (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
paymentId
required
string <uuid>

Odeme kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments/{paymentId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments/{paymentId}

  • 401

application/json

  • "code": "OD-9921",
  • "case_id": "d4c3b2a1-f6e5-8b7a-0d9c-2f1e4b3a6c5d",
  • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",

  • "fee": 1020000,
  • "status": "beklemede",
  • "method": "havale",

  • "created_at": "2026-06-19T09:00:00Z",

Odeme durumu veya odendi tarihini guncelle (admin)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
paymentId
required
string <uuid>

Odeme kimligi.

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
status
string (PaymentStatus)
Enum: "beklemede" "kismi" "odendi" "islemde" "red"

Odeme durumu. beklemede|kismi|odendi

paid_at
string <date-time>

Odemenin gerceklestigi tarih ve saat.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments/{paymentId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/payments/{paymentId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "beklemede",
  • "paid_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2f3a-4b5c-6d7e8f9a0b1c",
  • "code": "OD-9921",
  • "case_id": "d4c3b2a1-f6e5-8b7a-0d9c-2f1e4b3a6c5d",
  • "customer_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  • "amount": 6800000,
  • "fee": 1020000,
  • "status": "beklemede",
  • "method": "havale",

  • "created_at": "2026-06-19T09:00:00Z",

}

Cekici taleplerini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

status
string (TowStatus)
Enum: "ariyor" "yolda" "tamam" "iptal"
Examples: status=yolda

Cekici durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/tow-requests

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/tow-requests

Cekici talebini guncelle (durum/surucu ata)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
towId
required
string <uuid>

Cekici talebi kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
status
string (TowStatus)
Enum: "ariyor" "yolda" "tamam" "iptal"

Cekici talep durumu. ariyor|yolda|tamam|iptal

driver_name
string <= 120 characters

Atanan surucunun adi

eta_minutes
integer >= 0

Tahmini varis suresi (dakika)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/tow-requests/{towId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/tow-requests/{towId}

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "status": "yolda",
  • "driver_name": "string",
  • "eta_minutes": 0
}

string

string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Yeni departman olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Departman adi

description
string <= 500 characters

Departman aciklamasi

string or null

Departman yoneticisi personel kimligi

string or null

Ust departman kimligi (alt departman icin)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/departments

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/departments

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

status
string (JobApplicationStatus)
Enum: "alindi" "inceleme" "mulakat" "olumlu" "olumsuz"

    ],

    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,

    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

string

required
non-empty
status
string (JobApplicationStatus)
Enum: "alindi" "inceleme" "mulakat" "olumlu" "olumsuz"

string <= 2000 characters

Is ilani olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Ilan basligi

department
required
string (JobDepartment)
Enum: "teknoloji" "operasyon" "urun" "musteri_hizmetleri" "finans" "hukuk"

Kariyer ilani departman taksonomisi (kasitli olarak admin Department kaynagindan ayri public liste).

type
required
string (JobType)
Enum: "tam_zamanli" "yari_zamanli" "staj" "uzaktan"

Calisma tipi

location
string <= 255 characters

Calisma konumu

level
string <= 255 characters

Pozisyon seviyesi

description
string <= 2000 characters

Ilan aciklamasi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/job-postings

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/job-postings

Yeni rol olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
key
required
string <= 255 characters

Rol anahtari (benzersiz)

label
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Personel listesini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

role
string (StaffRole)
Enum: "admin" "operasyon" "muhasebe" "satis" "destek"
Examples: role=operasyon

Personel rolune gore filtrele

status
string (StaffStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "izinli" "pasif"
Examples: status=aktif

Personel durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "7b1d2c3e-4f5a-6b7c-8d9e-0f1a2b3c4d5e",
      • "full_name": "Elif Demir",
      • "email": "elif.demir@kurum.com",
      • "phone": "+905321234567",
      • "role": "operasyon",
      • "status": "aktif",
      • "open_cases": 12,
      • "closed_cases": 87,
      • "rating": 4.6,
      • "created_at": "2025-09-01T08:00:00Z",
      • "department_id": "094fb5f1-8160-46ea-8cec-010c4b44e054"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Yeni personel olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
full_name
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Personelin tam adi

email
required
string <email>

Personel eposta adresi

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

national_id
string (NationalId) ^[1-9][0-9]{10}$

T.C. Kimlik Numarasi (11 hane).

role
required
string (StaffRole)
Enum: "admin" "operasyon" "muhasebe" "satis" "destek"

Personel rolu. admin|operasyon|muhasebe|satis|destek

status
string (StaffStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "izinli" "pasif"

Personel durumu. aktif|izinli|pasif

hired_at
string <date>

Ise giris tarihi

department_id
string <uuid>

Departman FK.

position_id
string <uuid>

Pozisyon FK.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "full_name": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "national_id": "10000000146",
  • "role": "operasyon",
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "hired_at": "2019-08-24",
  • "department_id": "094fb5f1-8160-46ea-8cec-010c4b44e054",
  • "position_id": "a92aa83d-7963-4315-8d81-5d1c5b730d9d"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "7b1d2c3e-4f5a-6b7c-8d9e-0f1a2b3c4d5e",
  • "full_name": "Elif Demir",
  • "email": "elif.demir@kurum.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "role": "operasyon",
  • "status": "aktif",
  • "open_cases": 12,
  • "closed_cases": 87,
  • "rating": 4.6,
  • "portfolio_value": 125000000,
  • "prim_rate": 15,
  • "title": "Kidemli Operasyon Uzmani",

  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "salary": 150000,
  • "iban": "TR330006100519786457841326",

    • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
    • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
full_name
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Personelin tam adi

email
string <email>

Personel eposta adresi

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

role
string (StaffRole)
Enum: "admin" "operasyon" "muhasebe" "satis" "destek"

Personel rolu. admin|operasyon|muhasebe|satis|destek

status
string (StaffStatus)
Enum: "aktif" "izinli" "pasif"

Personel durumu. aktif|izinli|pasif

department_id
string <uuid>

Departman FK.

position_id
string <uuid>

Pozisyon FK.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}

Personel avanslarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

status
string (AdvanceStatus)
Enum: "beklemede" "odendi" "red"

Avans durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/advances

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/advances

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "staff_id": "4dfd334e-64d8-4482-906d-5dadd5efac56",
      • "amount": 150000,
      • "requested_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "due_date": "2019-08-24",
      • "status": "beklemede",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
amount
required
integer <int64> >= 0

Avans tutari (kurus)

due_date
string <date>

Geri odeme/vade tarihi

note
string <= 500 characters

Avans talebine iliskin not

Personel puantaj kayitlarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

status
string (AttendanceStatus)
Enum: "geldi" "izinli" "gec" "yok"

Puantaj durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/attendance

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/attendance

  • 429

application/json

      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Personel icin puantaj kaydi olustur

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
date
required
string <date>

Puantaj tarihi

check_in
required
string <time>

Giris saati (HH:MM:SS)

string or null

Cikis saati (HH:MM:SS)

status
required
string (AttendanceStatus)
Enum: "geldi" "izinli" "gec" "yok"

Puantaj durumu

overtime_minutes
integer >= 0
Default: 0

Fazla mesai suresi (dakika)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/attendance

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/attendance

Content type
application/json

  • "date": "2019-08-24",
  • "check_in": "14:15:22Z",
  • "check_out": "14:15:22Z",
  • "status": "geldi",
  • "overtime_minutes": 0
}

Personel bordrolarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

status
string (PayrollStatus)
Enum: "taslak" "onaylandi" "odendi"

Bordro durumuna gore filtrele

period_month
string (MonthString) ^[0-9]{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$
Examples: period_month=2026-06

Donem ayina gore filtrele (YYYY-MM)

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/payrolls

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/payrolls

application/json

    • {

      • "tax": 150000,
      • "sgk": 150000,
      • "bonus": 150000,
      • "net": 150000,
      • "status": "taslak",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Personel icin bordro olustur (hesapla)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
period_month
required
string (MonthString) ^[0-9]{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$

Ay (YYYY-MM).

bonus
integer <int64> >= 0

Eklenecek prim/ikramiye (kurus)

  • "net": 150000,
  • "status": "taslak",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Bordro detayini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
staffId
required
string <uuid>

Personel kimligi

payrollId
required
string <uuid>

Bordro kimligi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/staff/{staffId}/payrolls/{payrollId}

Admin-Raporlar

Finansal ve performans raporlari

Yonetim panosu ozet istatistikleri

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
date_from
string <date>

Istatistik baslangic tarihi

date_to
string <date>

Istatistik bitis tarihi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/dashboard/stats

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/dashboard/stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "totals": {
    • "customers": 1284,
    • "open_cases": 173,
    • "monthly_revenue": 4500000000,
    • "pending_payments": 1200000000
    },
  • "cases_by_status": {
    • "yeni": 42,
    • "inceleme": 58,
    • "belge": 21,
    • "basvuru": 30,
    • "odeme": 12,
    • "tamam": 8,
    • "red": 2
    },
  • "recent_activity": [
    • {
      • "id": "6b7c8d9e-0f1a-2b3c-4d5e-6f7a8b9c0d1e",
      • "type": "case_opened",
      • "description": "Yeni dosya acildi - KR-2026-1042",
      • "created_at": "2026-06-23T08:30:00Z"
      }
    ]
}

Finansal rapor (gelir/gider ozeti)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

group_by
string
Default: "ay"
Enum: "gun" "hafta" "ay" "yil"

Raporun gruplanacagi periyot

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/reports/financial

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/reports/financial

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "date_from": "2019-08-24",
  • "date_to": "2019-08-24",
  • "group_by": "gun",
  • "total_revenue": 150000,
  • "total_payout": 150000,
  • "net_income": 150000,
  • "payment_count": 0,
  • "buckets": [
    • {
      • "period": "string",
      • "revenue": 150000,
      • "payout": 150000,
      • "net": 150000,
      • "count": 0
      }
    ]
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

Personel performans raporu

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

staff_id
string <uuid>

Tek bir personeli filtrele

role
string (StaffRole)
Enum: "admin" "operasyon" "muhasebe" "satis" "destek"
Examples: role=operasyon

Role gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/reports/performance

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/reports/performance

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "date_from": "2019-08-24",
  • "date_to": "2019-08-24",
  • "rows": [
    • {
      • "staff_id": "4dfd334e-64d8-4482-906d-5dadd5efac56",
      • "full_name": "string",
      • "role": "operasyon",
      • "assigned_cases": 0,
      • "closed_cases": 0,
      • "avg_resolution_hours": 0,
      • "handled_revenue": 150000
      }
    ]
}

Admin-Iletisim

Cagri santrali, omnichannel sohbet ve e-posta

Cagri kayitlarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

type
string (CallType)
Enum: "gelen" "giden" "cevapsiz"

Cagri turune gore filtrele

status
string (CallStatus)
Enum: "cevaplandi" "kapali" "reddedildi" "cevapsiz"

Cagri durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calls

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calls

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "type": "gelen",
      • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
      • "phone": "+905321234567",
      • "started_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "status": "cevaplandi",
      • "notes": [
        • {
          • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
          • "body": "string",
          • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "call_id": "0d0a16ab-a508-4d58-bf24-5dc3cb248f3e",
          • "created_by": "ee824cad-d7a6-4f48-87dc-e8461a9201c4"
          }
        ],
      • "recording_url": "http://example.com",
      • "assignee_id": "e209ca2d-190b-4818-b659-67d4ef4f1ce8",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "contact_name": "string",
      • "duration_seconds": 0,
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Cagri kaydi detayini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
callId
required
string <uuid>

Cagri kaydinin kimligi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calls/{callId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calls/{callId}

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "type": "gelen",
  • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "started_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "status": "cevaplandi",
  • "notes": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "body": "string",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "call_id": "0d0a16ab-a508-4d58-bf24-5dc3cb248f3e",
      • "created_by": "ee824cad-d7a6-4f48-87dc-e8461a9201c4"
      }
    ],
  • "recording_url": "http://example.com",
  • "assignee_id": "e209ca2d-190b-4818-b659-67d4ef4f1ce8",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "contact_name": "string",
  • "duration_seconds": 0,
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Cagri kaydina not ekle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
callId
required
string <uuid>

Cagri kaydinin kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
body
required
string <= 2000 characters

Eklenecek not metni

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calls/{callId}/notes

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/calls/{callId}/notes

Content type
application/json
{
  • "body": "string"
}

  • 400

  • 409
  • 422

  • 500

Sohbet konusmalarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

channel
string (ChatChannel)
Enum: "whatsapp" "instagram" "facebook" "twitter" "telegram" "web"

Sohbet kanalina gore filtrele

status
string (ConversationStatus)
Enum: "acik" "kapali"

Konusma durumuna gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/conversations

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/conversations

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "channel": "whatsapp",
      • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
      • "contact_name": "string",
      • "status": "acik",
      • "unread_count": 0,
      • "last_message_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "assignee_id": "e209ca2d-190b-4818-b659-67d4ef4f1ce8",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
conversationId
required
string <uuid>

Konusmanin kimligi

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

Konusmaya mesaj gonder

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
conversationId
required
string <uuid>

Konusmanin kimligi

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
body
required
string <= 4000 characters

Gonderilecek mesaj metni

attachment_ids
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]

Eklenecek belge id listesi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/conversations/{conversationId}/messages

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/conversations/{conversationId}/messages

Konusmayi okundu olarak isaretle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
conversationId
required
string <uuid>

Konusmanin kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/conversations/{conversationId}/read

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/conversations/{conversationId}/read

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "channel": "whatsapp",
  • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
  • "contact_name": "string",
  • "status": "acik",
  • "unread_count": 0,
  • "last_message_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "assignee_id": "e209ca2d-190b-4818-b659-67d4ef4f1ce8",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
conversationId
required
string <uuid>

Konusmanin kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
status
required
string (ConversationStatus)
Enum: "acik" "kapali"

Konusma durumu

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401

  • 429

Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "channel": "whatsapp",
  • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e",
  • "contact_name": "string",
  • "status": "acik",
  • "unread_count": 0,
  • "last_message_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "assignee_id": "e209ca2d-190b-4818-b659-67d4ef4f1ce8",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Eposta mesajlarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

folder
string (EmailFolder)
Enum: "inbox" "sent" "draft" "archive"

Eposta klasorune gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/emails

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/emails

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "folder": "inbox",
      • "subject": "string",
      • "from_address": "user@example.com",
      • "to_addresses": [
        • "user@example.com"
        ],
      • "cc": [
        • "user@example.com"
        ],
      • "priority": "normal",
      • "has_attachments": true,
      • "snippet": "string",
      • "messages": [
        • {
          • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
          • "from_address": "user@example.com",
          • "body": "string",
          • "attachments": [
            • {
              • "id": "5a6b7c8d-9e0f-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f7a8b9c0d",
              • "type": "foto",
              • "file_name": "kaza_foto_1.jpg",

          }
        ],
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "read_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "customer_id": "160c0c4b-9966-4dc1-a916-8407eb10d74e"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Eposta olustur ve gonder

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
to_addresses
required
Array of strings <email> [ items <email > ]

Alici eposta adresleri

cc
Array of strings <email> [ items <email > ]

Bilgi alici eposta adresleri

subject
required
string <= 255 characters

Eposta konusu

body
required
string <= 4000 characters

Eposta govdesi

priority
string (EmailPriority)
Enum: "normal" "yuksek"

Eposta onceligi

send
boolean

True ise gonderilir, false ise taslak olarak kaydedilir

attachment_ids
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]

Eklenecek belge id listesi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/emails

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/emails

  • "priority": "normal",
  • "send": true,

    ]
}

Eposta taslagini guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
emailId
required
string <uuid>

Epostanin kimligi

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
to_addresses
required
Array of strings <email> [ items <email > ]

Alici eposta adresleri

cc
Array of strings <email> [ items <email > ]

Bilgi alici eposta adresleri

subject
required
string <= 255 characters

Eposta konusu

body
required
string <= 4000 characters

Eposta govdesi

priority
string (EmailPriority)
Enum: "normal" "yuksek"

Eposta onceligi

send
boolean

True ise gonderilir, false ise taslak olarak kaydedilir

attachment_ids
Array of strings <uuid> [ items <uuid > ]

Eklenecek belge id listesi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/emails/{emailId}

body

Kariyer

Is ilanlari ve basvurular

Is basvurusu gonder

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
job_id
required
string <uuid>

Basvurulan is ilani kimligi

full_name
required
string [ 2 .. 120 ] characters

Aday adi soyadi

email
required
string <email>

Aday e-posta adresi

phone
required
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

cv_document_id
required
string <uuid>

Yuklenen CV belge kimligi

Array of objects (JobEducation)

Egitim bilgileri

Array of objects (JobExperience)

Is deneyimleri

skills
Array of strings

Yetenekler

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/careers/applications

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/careers/applications

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "job_id": "453bd7d7-5355-4d6d-a38e-d9e7eb218c3f",
  • "full_name": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "phone": "+905321234567",
  • "cv_document_id": "2ac4f7c8-9253-4cb6-b2b8-e8b0327e276e",
  • "educations": [
    • {
      • "school": "string",
      • "degree": "string",
      • "year": 0
      }
    ],
  • "experiences": [
    • {
      • "company": "string",
      • "role": "string",
      • "years": 0
      }
    ],
  • "skills": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "status": "alindi",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Acik is ilanlarini listele

query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

department
string (JobDepartment)
Enum: "teknoloji" "operasyon" "urun" "musteri_hizmetleri" "finans" "hukuk"

Departmana gore filtrele

type
string (JobType)
Enum: "tam_zamanli" "yari_zamanli" "staj" "uzaktan"

Calisma tipine gore filtrele

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/careers/jobs

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/careers/jobs

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "title": "string",
      • "department": "teknoloji",
      • "type": "tam_zamanli",
      • "location": "string",
      • "level": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "is_open": true,
      • "posted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Is ilani detayini getir

path Parameters
jobId
required
string <uuid>

Is ilani kimligi

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/careers/jobs/{jobId}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/careers/jobs/{jobId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "title": "string",
  • "department": "teknoloji",
  • "type": "tam_zamanli",
  • "location": "string",
  • "level": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "is_open": true,
  • "posted_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Tutanak

Kaza tespit tutanagi (paylasilabilir + katilimli)

Kendi kaza tespit tutanaklarini listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

sort
string
Examples: sort=-created_at

Siralama alani ve yonu. Onune eksi isareti konursa azalan siralama yapilir (ornek -created_at).

q
string
Examples: q=KR-2026-1042

Serbest metin arama terimi.

date_from
string <date>
Examples: date_from=2026-01-01

Baslangic tarihi filtresi (dahil).

date_to
string <date>
Examples: date_to=2026-06-23

Bitis tarihi filtresi (dahil).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements

  • 400
  • 401
  • 422

application/json

    • {

Yeni kaza tespit tutanagi baslat

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
accident_date
required
string <date-time>

Kazanin meydana geldigi tarih ve saat.

required
object (LocationWithAddress)

Koordinat + acik adres.

required
object (CreateStatementPartyRequest)

Tutanak taraf girisi (sunucu-kontrollu alanlar haric).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "accident_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "location": {
    • "geo": {
      • "lat": 41.0082,
      • "lng": 28.9784
      },
    • "address": {
      • "line1": "Bagdat Caddesi No 42",
      • "line2": "Kat 3 Daire 5",
      • "district": "Kadikoy",
      • "city": "Istanbul",
      • "postal_code": "34710",
      • "country": "TR",
      • "geo": {
        • "lat": 41.0082,
        • "lng": 28.9784
        }
      }
    },
  • "party": {
    • "role": "taraf_a",
    • "full_name": "string",
    • "national_id": "10000000146",
    • "plate": "34ABC123",
    • "insurer_name": "string",
    • "policy_no": "string",
    • "statement_text": "string"
    }
}

Davet koduyla mevcut tutanaga katil

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
invite_code
required
string <= 255 characters

Tutanaga katilim icin davet kodu.

required
object (CreateStatementPartyRequest)

Tutanak taraf girisi (sunucu-kontrollu alanlar haric).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/join

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/join

    • "statement_text": "string"
    }
}

Tek bir kaza tespit tutanagini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
statementId
required
string <uuid>

Tutanak benzersiz kimligi.

Tutanagi PDF olarak indir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
statementId
required
string <uuid>

Tutanak benzersiz kimligi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/{statementId}/pdf

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/{statementId}/pdf

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "bad_request",
    • "message": "Istek gecersiz veya hatali bicimlendirilmis.",
    • "request_id": "req_01HZX8K9P2",
    • "details": [ ]
    }
}

Tutanak icin paylasim linki veya QR uret

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
statementId
required
string <uuid>

Tutanak benzersiz kimligi.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
method
required
string (ShareMethod)
Enum: "link" "qr" "sms"

Paylasim yontemi.

phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/{statementId}/share

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/{statementId}/share

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "method": "link",
  • "phone": "+905321234567"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "share_url": "http://example.com",
  • "qr_url": "http://example.com",
  • "invite_code": "string"
}

Kaza krokisini onayla veya itiraz et

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
statementId
required
string <uuid>

Tutanak benzersiz kimligi.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string <uuid>
Examples: 9f1c2d3e-4b5a-6c7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f

Idempotent yeniden deneme icin istemci tarafindan uretilen benzersiz anahtar. Ayni anahtarla tekrar edilen istek ayni sonucu doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
decision
required
string (SketchDecision)
Enum: "onayla" "itiraz"

Kroki uzerine verilen karar.

string or null

Itiraz durumunda aciklama notu.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/{statementId}/sketch-approval

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/app/statements/{statementId}/sketch-approval

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "decision": "onayla",
  • "objection_note": "string"
}

Admin-Ayarlar

Sistem ayarlari ve entegrasyonlar

Entegrasyonlari listele

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
Examples: page=1

Sayfa numarasi (1 tabanli).

per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Examples: per_page=20

Sayfa basina kayit sayisi.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/integrations

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/integrations

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "key": "string",
      • "label": "string",
      • "enabled": true,
      • "config": { }
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "page": 1,
    • "per_page": 20,
    • "total": 137,
    • "total_pages": 7,
    • "has_next": true,
    • "has_prev": true
    }
}

Entegrasyon ayarini guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
integrationKey
required
string

Entegrasyon kanonik anahtari (slug; uuid degil).

header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
enabled
boolean
object

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/integrations/{integrationKey}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/integrations/{integrationKey}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "enabled": true,
  • "config": { }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "key": "string",
  • "label": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "config": { }
}

Entegrasyon detayi

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
integrationKey
required
string

Entegrasyon kanonik anahtari (slug; uuid degil).

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/integrations/{integrationKey}

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/integrations/{integrationKey}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "key": "string",
  • "label": "string",
  • "enabled": true,
  • "config": { }
}

Sistem ayarlarini getir

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/settings

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/settings

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  • "company_name": "string",
  • "support_email": "user@example.com",
  • "support_phone": "+905321234567",
  • "default_commission_rate": 100,
  • "referral_bonus": 150000,
  • "maintenance_mode": true,
  • "updated_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "auto_file_assignment": true,
  • "high_fault_warning": true,
  • "statute_tracking": true,
  • "notification_email": true,
  • "notification_sms": true
}

Sistem ayarlarini guncelle

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
If-Match
required
string
Examples: "a1b2c3d4"

Optimistic locking icin kaynagin mevcut ETag/versiyon degeri. Eslesmezse 409 Conflict doner.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
non-empty
company_name
string <= 255 characters

Sirket adi

support_email
string <email>

Destek eposta adresi

support_phone
string (PhoneNumber) ^\+90[0-9]{10}$

E.164 formatinda Turkiye telefon numarasi.

default_commission_rate
integer [ 0 .. 100 ]

Varsayilan komisyon orani (yuzde)

referral_bonus
integer <int64> >= 0

Referans bonusu (kurus)

maintenance_mode
boolean

Bakim modu aktif mi

auto_file_assignment
boolean

Otomatik dosya atama.

high_fault_warning
boolean

Yuksek kusur uyarisi.

statute_tracking
boolean

Zamanasimi takibi.

notification_email
boolean

E-posta bildirimleri.

notification_sms
boolean

SMS bildirimleri.

Responses

Production

https://api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/settings

Sandbox

https://sandbox.api.kazaplatform.example/v1/admin/settings

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type

Hesaplama tamamlandi Webhook

Request Body schema: application/json
required
event
required
string
Value: "calculation.completed"
occurred_at
required
string <date-time>
required
object (Calculation)

Hesaplama read-model. Misafir (customer_id null) tarafindan da olusturulabilir.

Responses

application/json

required
event

string

occurred_at

string <date-time>
